<!DOCTYPE html>
<!-- build: v4 -->
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1" />
<title>Judô Olimpiex 2026 — Chaves ao vivo</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg: #171d14;
    --bg-alt: #1e2519;
    --surface: #232b1c;
    --surface-2: #2a3322;
    --line: #3c452f;
    --gold: #c9a227;
    --gold-soft: #e0c05a;
    --ink: #ede6d3;
    --ink-dim: #a9ab97;
    --win: #6b8f4e;
    --loss: #7a3b32;
    --white-belt: #f4f1e8;
    --yellow-belt: #d8b93b;
    --orange-belt: #c67a34;
    --green-belt: #4f7a3e;
    --blue-belt: #2f5f8a;
    --radius: 10px;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html,body{margin:0;padding:0;}
  body{
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at top left, rgba(201,162,39,0.07), transparent 55%),
      var(--bg);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
    min-height:100vh;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  .display{font-family:'Oswald', sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.02em;}
  .mono{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;}

  header.top{
    position:sticky; top:0; z-index:50;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg) 85%, transparent);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:14px 16px 10px;
  }
  .eyebrow{
    font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.18em; color:var(--gold);
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-bottom:2px;
  }
  .eyebrow .dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);}
  h1.title{font-size:22px; margin:0; color:var(--ink); font-weight:600;}
  .subtitle{font-size:12px; color:var(--ink-dim); margin-top:2px;}

  .mode-row{display:flex; gap:8px; margin-top:12px; align-items:center;}
  .mode-btn{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.06em;
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); color:var(--ink-dim);
    padding:7px 12px; border-radius:999px; cursor:pointer;
  }
  .mode-btn.active{background:var(--gold); color:#1a1607; border-color:var(--gold); font-weight:600;}
  .admin-badge{
    margin-left:auto; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px;
    color:var(--win); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;
  }
  .admin-badge .pip{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--win); box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--win);}

  .cat-scroll{display:flex; gap:6px; overflow-x:auto; padding:12px 16px 4px; -ms-overflow-style:none; scrollbar-width:none;}
  .cat-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
  .cat-chip{
    flex:0 0 auto; padding:8px 14px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid var(--line);
    background:var(--surface); color:var(--ink-dim); font-size:12.5px; cursor:pointer;
    white-space:nowrap; font-weight:500;
  }
  .cat-chip.active{background:var(--surface-2); color:var(--gold-soft); border-color:var(--gold);}

  main{padding:8px 16px 60px; max-width:1500px; margin:0 auto;}

  .cat-header{display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:baseline; margin:14px 2px 10px; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px;}
  .cat-header h2{font-family:'Oswald', sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:19px; margin:0; color:var(--ink); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.01em;}
  .cat-header .weight{color:var(--gold-soft); font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12px;}

  .podium{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px,1fr)); gap:8px; margin-bottom:18px;}
  .podium .slot{background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:8px 10px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;}
  .podium .slot .rank{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10px; color:var(--ink-dim);}
  .podium .slot .name{font-size:12.5px; font-weight:600; margin-top:2px; min-height:16px; line-height:1.25;}
  .podium .slot.gold{border-color:var(--gold); background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(201,162,39,0.14), var(--surface));}
  .podium .slot.silver{border-color:#9aa3a8;}
  .podium .slot.bronze{border-color:#a15c3a;}
  .podium .slot img.crest{width:22px; height:auto; flex:0 0 auto;}

  /* CM crest picker */
  .cm-picker{display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:6px;}
  .cm-opt{display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:3px; width:46px;}
  .cm-btn{
    width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:6px; border:1.5px solid var(--line); background:var(--bg-alt);
    cursor:pointer; padding:2px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .cm-btn img{width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain;}
  .cm-btn.selected{border-color:var(--gold); box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--gold);}
  .cm-opt .cm-code{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:9px; color:var(--ink-dim); text-align:center;}
  .cm-opt.selected .cm-code{color:var(--gold-soft); font-weight:600;}
  .cm-label{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:9.5px; color:var(--ink-dim); margin-top:3px;}

  .err-banner{
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:200; background:#5a1f18; color:#ffd9d0;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11.5px; padding:10px 14px; border-bottom:2px solid #e08b7c;
    white-space:pre-wrap; word-break:break-word; max-height:40vh; overflow-y:auto;
  }
  .err-banner button{
    float:right; background:none; border:1px solid #e08b7c; color:#ffd9d0; border-radius:6px; padding:3px 8px; cursor:pointer; font-family:inherit;
  }

  /* bracket with connector lines */
  .bracket-scroll{overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:visible; padding-bottom:34px; position:relative;}
  .bracket{display:flex; gap:56px; min-width:max-content; padding:4px 2px; position:relative;}
  .bracket svg.connectors{position:absolute; top:0; left:0; pointer-events:none; overflow:visible;}
  .round{display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-around; min-width:200px; position:relative; z-index:1;}
  .round-label{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10.5px; color:var(--ink-dim); margin-bottom:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;}
  .belt-chip{width:22px; height:6px; border-radius:3px; display:inline-block; border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.3);}
  .belt-1{background:var(--white-belt);}
  .belt-2{background:var(--yellow-belt);}
  .belt-3{background:var(--orange-belt);}
  .belt-4{background:var(--green-belt);}
  .belt-5{background:var(--blue-belt);}

  .match-block{margin-bottom:34px; position:relative;}
  .match-num{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10px; color:var(--ink-dim); margin-bottom:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .stage-tag{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif; font-size:9.5px; color:var(--gold-soft); background:rgba(201,162,39,0.12); border:1px solid rgba(201,162,39,0.35); padding:1px 7px; border-radius:999px; text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0;}
  .match{background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:var(--radius); overflow:hidden;}
  .slot{display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:8px 9px; font-size:12.5px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); cursor:default; gap:6px;}
  .slot:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  .slot .crest-mini{width:18px; height:auto; flex:0 0 auto; border-radius:2px;}
  .slot .nm{overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; flex:1;}
  .slot .cm{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:9.5px; color:var(--ink-dim); flex:0 0 auto;}
  .slot.empty .nm{color:var(--ink-dim); font-style:italic;}
  .slot.winner{background:rgba(107,143,78,0.16);}
  .slot.winner .nm{color:var(--win); font-weight:600;}
  .slot.loser .nm{color:var(--ink-dim); text-decoration:line-through; text-decoration-color:var(--loss);}
  .slot.clickable{cursor:pointer;}
  .slot.clickable:hover{background:rgba(201,162,39,0.10);}
  .bye-tag{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:9px; color:var(--gold-soft); border:1px solid var(--gold); padding:1px 5px; border-radius:4px;}
  .placement-tag{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10px; color:#1a1607; background:var(--gold-soft); padding:2px 6px; border-radius:4px; margin-top:6px; display:inline-block;}
  .placement-tag.silver{background:#c3c9ce;}

  .admin-panel{background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:14px; margin-bottom:18px;}
  .admin-panel h3{margin:0 0 10px; font-size:13px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; color:var(--gold-soft); font-weight:600;}
  .athlete-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:10px;}
  @media(min-width:720px){.athlete-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}
  .athlete-card{background:var(--bg-alt); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:8px; padding:8px 10px;}
  .athlete-card .pos{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; color:var(--gold-soft); margin-bottom:5px; display:block;}
  .athlete-card input{
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); color:var(--ink);
    border-radius:6px; padding:7px 8px; font-size:13px; font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif; width:100%; margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .athlete-card input:focus{outline:1px solid var(--gold); border-color:var(--gold);}

  .reset-btn{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; color:var(--loss); background:none; border:1px solid var(--loss); padding:6px 10px; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer; margin-top:10px;}

  .modal-back{position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(10,12,8,0.72); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; z-index:100; padding:20px;}
  .modal{background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--gold); border-radius:12px; padding:22px; width:100%; max-width:320px;}
  .modal h3{margin:0 0 4px; font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; font-size:16px;}
  .modal p{color:var(--ink-dim); font-size:12.5px; margin:0 0 14px;}
  .modal input{width:100%; background:var(--bg-alt); border:1px solid var(--line); color:var(--ink); padding:10px; border-radius:8px; font-size:14px; margin-bottom:10px;}
  .modal .row{display:flex; gap:8px;}
  .modal button{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; padding:9px 12px; border-radius:8px; cursor:pointer; border:1px solid var(--line); background:var(--bg-alt); color:var(--ink);}
  .modal button.primary{background:var(--gold); color:#1a1607; border-color:var(--gold); font-weight:600; flex:1;}
  .modal .err{color:#e08b7c; font-size:12px; margin:-4px 0 10px;}

  .cat-chip.rank-chip{border-color:var(--gold); color:var(--gold-soft); font-weight:600;}
  .cat-chip.rank-chip.active{background:var(--gold); color:#1a1607;}

  .rank-note{font-size:12px; color:var(--ink-dim); margin:0 2px 16px; max-width:60ch;}
  .rank-table{border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:var(--radius); overflow:hidden; background:var(--surface);}
  .rank-row{display:grid; grid-template-columns:26px 1.5fr 38px repeat(8, 28px); align-items:center; gap:3px; padding:8px 8px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); font-size:12px;}
  .rank-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  .rank-row.rank-head{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10px; color:var(--ink-dim); background:var(--bg-alt);}
  .rank-row.rank-top1{background:linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(201,162,39,0.16), transparent);}
  .rank-row.rank-top2{background:linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(195,201,206,0.12), transparent);}
  .rank-row.rank-top3{background:linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(161,92,58,0.12), transparent);}
  .rank-col{overflow:hidden;}
  .rank-col-cm{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-weight:600;}
  .rank-col-cm img.crest-mini{width:18px; height:auto; flex:0 0 auto;}
  .rank-col-med, .rank-col-total, .rank-col-pos{text-align:center; color:var(--ink-dim);}
  .rank-col-total{color:var(--gold-soft); font-weight:600;}
  @media(max-width:640px){
    .rank-row{grid-template-columns:20px 1fr 32px repeat(8, 22px); font-size:10.5px; padding:7px 3px;}
    .rank-col-cm img.crest-mini{width:15px;}
  }

  footer{text-align:center; padding:20px; color:var(--ink-dim); font-size:11px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;}
  .sync-note{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; justify-content:center; margin-bottom:4px;}
  .sync-note .pip{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--win);}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header class="top">
  <div class="eyebrow"><span class="dot"></span>CHAVES AO VIVO</div>
  <h1 class="title display">Judô Olimpiex 2026</h1>
  <div class="subtitle">Clube do Exército - SMU · 15 a 17 JUL 2026</div>
  <div class="mode-row">
    <button class="mode-btn active" id="btnPublic">PÚBLICO</button>
    <button class="mode-btn" id="btnAdmin">PAINEL DO DIRETOR</button>
    <div class="admin-badge" id="adminBadge" style="display:none;"><span class="pip"></span>MODO ADMIN</div>
  </div>
</header>

<div class="cat-scroll" id="catScroll"></div>

<main id="main"></main>

<footer>
  <div class="sync-note"><span class="pip"></span>Atualiza automaticamente</div>
  Comissão de Desporto do Exército
</footer>

<div id="modalRoot"></div>

<script>
const CM_COMMANDS = [
  { code: "CMP", nome: "Comando Militar do Planalto", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
  { code: "CMS", nome: "Comando Militar do Sul", img: "data:image/png;base64,
